title: Ark Hospital
heading: Expert Orthopedic and OB-GYN Care in Mumbai
description: Established in 2006, Ark Hospital is a specialist centre for orthopedic and Obgyn care. Founded by Dr. VINOD Agrawal and Dr. Rekha Agrawal. Dr. Vinod is a nationally renowned orthopedic surgeon with over 8000 successful joint replacement and over 3000 successful spine surgeries performed in his career spanning 35 years. Dr. Rekha is an Obstetrician and Gynaecologist with expertise in laparoscopic or key hole surgery and has been in practice since the last 30 years.
text: Ark Hospital +91-9821330707 info@ark.hospital Home About Us Obstetrics and Gynaecology Orthopedics Contact Us NEWS – Workshop Select Page Expert Orthopedic and OB-GYN Care in Mumbai Book an appointment Dr. VINOD AGRAWAL Director, Spine and Joint Replacement Specialist Nationally renowned, Dr. Vinod has performed over 8000 joint replacement surgeries and over 5000 spine surgeries in a career spanning 35 years. He has been at the forefront of innovation in his specialty with the use of robotic total knee replacement. Dr. REKHA AGRAWAL Director, Consultant Obstetrician and Gynaecologist Dr. Rekha is a specialist laparoscopic (key-hole) surgeon and has been helping new mothers and fathers welcome in their newborns since the last 32 years. She has performed complicated and large tumor excision surgeries and delivered over 3000 children. Our Mission Is to Provide a Professional & Honest Approach to Health Care Established in 2006, Ark Hospital has treated more than 10,000+ patients on outpatient basis and helped better the lives of more than 5000 through surgical intervention Meet Our Doctors N Experienced Doctors Doctor Rekha and Vinod have over 30 years of experience in their respective fields. N Professional & Friendly Staff Our staff has been trained to make our patient comfortable and put the patient needs first. N On Call 24/7 In case of an emergency, we will try and make sure that a doctor sees you as soon as possible N Same/Next Day Appointments In case of acute distress, you can work with us to make sure that you are seen as early as possible N Walk-In's Accepted We accept walk-in patients, however, those on the appointment list are always given priority N No Hidden Fees What you see is what you pay. In case of any questions regarding fee for your services, you can contact our staff members. Our Expertise We have the armamentarium to deal with all sorts of complex and specialist surgeries. Some have been named below Total Knee Replacement This is a surgery to replace the worn-out or damaged knee joint with an artificial joint. Dr. Vinod is renowned for performing complex and robotic TKRs Learn More Pregnancy Care Mothers require special care. Dr. Rekha’s 30 year experience in helping young women become mothers allows her to alleviate most fears of becoming a mother Learn More Total Hip Replacement In expert hands, a total hip replacement is one of the most patient-satisfying surgeries and helps patients get back to their daily active lifestyle. Learn More Specialist Spine Care Dedicated spine care to make sure you meet your daily activity needs with the help of conservative and surgical treatments. Learn More Laparoscopic (Key-Hole) Surgery Dr. Rekha is a specialist in laparoscopic and minimally invasive surgery for OBGYN. Learn More Sports Injury Rehabilitation Knee and Shoulder Arthroscopy, ACL reconstructions, Menisectomies and Physiotherapy Rehab are routinely performed Learn More View All Services Your Health Starts Here Flexible appointments and urgent care.
